## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `qrtunnel ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include full terminal output / stack trace.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 / macOS 14]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.2]
- QRTunnel version: [e.g. 3.5.2]
- Tunnel mode used: [Smart / LAN / SSH / ngrok]
- Installation method: [pip / from source]

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (network setup, VPN, firewall, etc.).
